case_title: WOODS, JOYCE AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM-SHAQUILLE WOODS VS KIM, EUNHEE

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF OCT-01-2008
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,750.00 FILED BY WOODS, JOYCE AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM-SHAQUILLE WOODS AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, EUNHEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, EUNHEE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOODS, JOYCE AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM-SHAQUILLE WOODS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, EUNHEE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,080.00, THE COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION, AMENDS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO APPOINT JOYCE WOODS AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR SHAQUILLE WOODS, A MINOR. DAMAGES ORDERED FOR PLAINTIFF, REPRESENTS DEFENDANTS ALLOCATED PORTION OF THE TOTAL DAMAGE AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
